name: @caia/info-architect
description: Information Architect (IA) Agent — Step 3.5 in CAIA's canonical pipeline (ratified 2026-05-25 in ADR-024). Consumes BusinessPlanV2 + tenant context and emits three canonical structural artifacts: pages-catalogue (sitemap + template + section stacks), design-system (color/typography/spacing tokens + light/dark mapping), and components-library (Atomic-Design catalogue with stable globally-unique IDs). The first pipeline step that produces structural truth; every downstream step reads its outputs as the canonical contract for 'what is this site, made of what, structured how.' Subscription-only via @chiefaia/claude-spawner. Drives the canonical FSM chain interview-complete → information-architecture-in-progress → information-architecture-complete via @caia/state-machine.
